* Fix Exit tool permission denied error in CopilotAgentRunner

Add OnPreToolUse session hook to auto-approve all tool calls since agents
run autonomously with no interactive user. Without this, the SDK defaults
to requesting user permission via JSON-RPC which fails with 'Permission
denied and could not request permission from user' when the Exit tool
(or any custom tool) is invoked.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix Exit tool permission denied error in CopilotAgentRunner

Add OnPermissionRequest handler to SessionConfig to auto-approve all tool
permission requests. The Copilot CLI's permission system requires explicit
approval via permission.request RPC calls. Without this handler, the SDK
cannot get user consent when running autonomously and returns 'Permission
denied and could not request permission from user' for all tool calls
including the Exit tool.

commit.message:
fix: only show registered marketplaces, simplify remove to CLI-only (#116)

## Summary

Cache-only marketplace directories (cloned by the CLI as a side-effect
of browsing/installing, but never explicitly registered) are now
ignored. Only marketplaces the user explicitly added via \copilot plugin
marketplace add\ are shown.

### Changes
- **\listMarketplaces()\**: Only returns entries from \config.json\
(registered). Cache-only dirs are intentionally ignored — they're CLI
implementation details, not user-configured marketplaces.
- **\ emoveMarketplace()\**: Simplified to a single CLI command
(\copilot plugin marketplace remove <key>\). No more dual-path \
s.rmSync\ fallback for cache-only entries.
- **\server.mjs\ / \server-prod.mjs\**: Routes updated to match new
signatures.
- **\pluginService.ts\ / \PluginHub.tsx\**: Delete button is now visible
for all non-protected entries (all listed entries always have a \
egisteredKey\). Removed the \m.registeredKey\ guard that was hiding the
button.
- Added \marketplaceService.d.mts\ for TypeScript types.
- Removed stale 'registeredKey is null' regression test; added test
verifying cache-only dirs are NOT listed.

### Why cache-only entries were confusing
The CLI downloads marketplace repos to \~/.copilot/marketplace-cache/\
as a side-effect of browsing, but doesn't register them in
\config.json\. Showing these entries was misleading because they weren't
something the user consciously added, and trying to delete them via
\copilot plugin marketplace remove\ would fail since they're not
registered.

## Tests
- 22 marketplace tests pass (14 service + 8 UI)

fix: batch stdout writes to eliminate terminal flickering

Windows Console Host redraws after every stdout.write() call.
Prompts calls write() many times per render (cursor moves, line
clears, new content). Patch stdout to buffer writes within a
microtask and flush them all in one call — one redraw per render.

commit.message:
fix(shared): atomic rate limiter increment — eliminate TOCTOU race (H-18)

Added `increment(key, resetTime)` to RateLimitStore interface that
atomically reads, increments, and returns the new count in a single
synchronous Map mutation (no await gap between read and write).

Rewrote recordFailedAttempt() to use the atomic increment instead of
the previous get() → count++ → set() pattern that allowed concurrent
requests to both read count=4 and bypass MAX_ATTEMPTS=5.

Updated Redis example in JSDoc to show INCR-based implementation.

commit.message:
feat: watch mode, fork mode, and resume guard for saved sessions

Three session interaction modes based on activity state:

Watch mode (active sessions - yellow dot):
- Clicking an active saved session opens a read-only live view
- Tails events.jsonl in real-time (500ms polling) and streams new
  messages to the dashboard
- Chat input is disabled with 'Watching session (read-only)' hint
- Shows '👁' prefix and 'live' badge in header

Fork mode (active sessions):
- '🔀 Fork' button in the header during watch mode
- Creates a brand-new session on otto's copilot server
- Seeds it with conversation history from the source session
- Names it 'fork: <original title>'
- Deduplicates names if forked multiple times
- Switches to interactive mode immediately

Resume (idle sessions only):
- Clicking an idle saved session resumes it (existing behavior)
- No longer offered for active sessions to prevent two processes
  writing to the same events.jsonl

Backend:
- Manager.ReadSessionEvents: parses events.jsonl into ChatMessages
- Manager.WatchSession: tails events.jsonl, calls onMessage callback
- Manager.ForkSession: CreateSession + history seed via context prompt
- New WS messages: watch_session, fork_session, watch_history,
  watch_event

[main] Source code updates from dotnet/fsharp (#5225)

[main] Source code updates from dotnet/fsharp


 - Move fsharp System.* package versions to Version.Details.xml for source-build

The fsharp PR dotnet/fsharp#19021 moved System.Collections.Immutable,
System.Composition, System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource, and
System.Reflection.Metadata from Version.Details.xml to hardcoded
properties in Versions.props. This causes prebuilt failures in
source-build because these packages are no longer tracked as
dependencies from dotnet/runtime.

Move them back to Version.Details.xml (with empty Sha, matching the
pattern used by dotnet/msbuild) and auto-generated Version.Details.props,
removing the hardcoded SystemPackagesVersion from Versions.props.
